name: Ch'en The Holungday
description:
"What are you staring at? Get changed already."

Finally arriving at the tropical town Siesta, Amiya and Doctor seem to have some business going on. That gives you and the other operators some time to relax. As Ch'en's apprentice for years, it is only natural that the two of you share a hotel room. Now it's time for you two to enjoy some vacation...

When looking up Arknights lore, I learned that I had no idea what is was about. So I spend way too much time learning about it and I didn't even include everything. I hope that nevertheless, it gives a somewhat immersive experience.

(This is a rework form the Ch'en bot I did before (and the first time ppl noticed I removed a bot). I was very unsatisfied with the scenario and went a step back, allowing you more freedom to enjoy the the city with Ch'en. I also removed some tokens, for better memory)

Avatar Picture | Bonus Picture 1 | Bonus Picture 2

Tags: Ch'en, Arknights, Bikini, Beach
